hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(cpp|h|hpp|cc|cxx|hxx)$' && echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'service/' && mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/state" && echo "AUTO_TRIGGER" > "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/state/trigger.flag" && echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/state/trigger.flag"

hooks.message: 🔍 检测到 C++ 代码变更 (service/)。建议运行 /test-analyze 进行测试影响分析。
